2603.29517.title: LLM Probe: Evaluating LLMs for Low-Resource Languages
2603.29517.paper_summary: Despite rapid advances in large language models (LLMs), their linguistic abilities in low-resource and morphologically rich languages are still not well understood due to limited annotated resources and the absence of standardized evaluation frameworks. This paper presents LLM Probe, a lexicon-based assessment framework designed to systematically evaluate the linguistic skills of LLMs in low-resource language environments. The framework analyzes models across four areas of language understanding: lexical alignment, part-of-speech recognition, morphosyntactic probing, and translation accuracy. To illustrate the framework, we create a manually annotated benchmark dataset using a low-resource Semitic language as a case study. The dataset comprises bilingual lexicons with linguistic annotations, including part-of-speech tags, grammatical gender, and morphosyntactic features, which demonstrate high inter-annotator agreement to ensure reliable annotations. We test a variety of models, including causal language models and sequence-to-sequence architectures. The results reveal notable differences in performance across various linguistic tasks: sequence-to-sequence models generally excel in morphosyntactic analysis and translation quality, whereas causal models demonstrate strong performance in lexical alignment but exhibit weaker translation accuracy. Our results emphasize the need for linguistically grounded evaluation to better understand LLM limitations in low-resource settings. We release LLM Probe and the accompanying benchmark dataset as open-source tools to promote reproducible benchmarking and to support the development of more inclusive multilingual language technologies.
2603.29517.paper_summary_zh: 儘管大型語言模型（LLMs）快速進步，但由於註釋資源有限和缺乏標準化的評估框架，它們在低資源和形態豐富語言中的語言能力仍然不太清楚。本文提出了LLM Probe，一個基於詞彙的評估框架，旨在系統性地評估LLMs在低資源語言環境中的語言技能。該框架分析模型在四個語言理解領域的表現：詞彙對齊、詞性識別、形態句法探測和翻譯準確性。為了說明該框架，我們使用一種低資源閃米特語言作為案例研究，創建了一個手動註釋的基準數據集。該數據集包含帶有語言註釋的雙語詞彙，包括詞性標籤、語法性別和形態句法特徵，這些特徵顯示出高的註釋者間一致性，以確保可靠的註釋。我們測試了各種模型，包括因果語言模型和序列到序列架構。結果顯示在各種語言任務中的性能存在顯著差異：序列到序列模型在形態句法分析和翻譯質量方面通常表現優異，而因果模型則在詞彙對齊方面表現強勁，但翻譯準確性較弱。我們的結果強調了基於語言的評估的必要性，以更好地理解LLM在低資源環境中的局限性。我們將LLM Probe和隨附的基準數據集作為開源工具發布，以促進可重複的基準測試，並支持更具包容性的多語言語言技術的發展。
2603.29517.author: Hailay Kidu Teklehaymanot et.al.
2603.29517.authors: Hailay Kidu Teklehaymanot, Gebrearegawi Gebremariam, Wolfgang Nejdl
